edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Used for Stage 1 initial pretraining of OLMo 3 32B, providing ~5.5 trillion tokens from a diverse mix of web pages, academic publications, code, and more (the core pretraining corpus).

evidence.excerpt:
Stage 1: Initial Pretraining
* Dataset: dolma3_mix-5.5T-1125
* 5.50T tokens
* Coverage: 94.83%+ of total pretraining budget
evidence.explanation: Identifies the Dolma 3 Mix as the dataset used for initial pretraining (5.5T tokens). ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=)) ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=%2A%20Dataset%3A%20dolma3_mix,of%20total%20pretraining%20budget))

evidence.excerpt: Dolma 3 Mix (6T) is the collection of data used during the pretraining stage to train the Olmo-3-1125-32B model. This dataset is made up of ~6 trillion tokens from a diverse mix of web content, academic publications, code, and more. The majority of this dataset comes from Common Crawl.
evidence.explanation: Confirms that ~6T tokens of diverse web, academic, and code content (mostly Common Crawl) were used to pretrain OLMo 3 32B. ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_mix-6T#:~:text=Dolma%203%20Mix%20))

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Common Crawl web text was the single largest component of OLMo-3-32B’s pretraining corpus and was later reused as a filtered high-quality subset (~22.5%) in the mid-training mix. The majority of tokens in Stage 1 came from Common Crawl dumps.

evidence.excerpt: The majority of this dataset comes from Common Crawl.
evidence.explanation: States that Common Crawl contributed the majority of tokens in the pretraining dataset. ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_mix-6T#:~:text=The%20Dolma%203%20Mix%20,dataset%20comes%20from%20Common%20Crawl))

Shows that a High Quality subset of Common Crawl content made up 22.5% (22.4B tokens) of the Dolmino mid-training mix. ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=STEM,%7C%2018.3M))

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Used for Stage 2 mid-training (100B tokens) to improve OLMo 3 32B’s capabilities in math, code, QA, chain-of-thought reasoning, and instruction-following. The Dolmino mix added carefully curated synthetic data in each of these areas.

evidence.excerpt:
Stage 2: Mid-training
* Dataset: dolma3-dolmino-mix-1125
* 100B tokens
* Mix composition: web pages, code, math/QA/thinking/instruction/PDFs
evidence.explanation: Identifies the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix (with web, code, math, QA, thinking, instruction, PDF content) as the dataset used for mid-training. ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=%23%20Stage%202%3A%20Mid))

evidence.excerpt: Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix, a 100B-token mid-training dataset targeting performance improvements in math, code, QA, instruction and thinking
evidence.explanation: Describes the purpose of the Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix: 100B mid-training data focusing on math, code, QA, instruction, and reasoning. ([github.com](https://github.com/allenai/dolma3#:~:text=Dolma%203%20consists%20of%20three,reconstructing%20the%20Dolma%203%20datasets))

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Used for Stage 3 long-context training (~100B tokens) to extend context length. The long-context mix combined prior mid-training data (majority) with high-quality scientific PDF text to train OLMo 3 32B on 65k token sequence lengths.

evidence.excerpt:
* Dataset: dolma3-longmino-mix-1125
* 100B tokens
* Mix composition: midtraining data and PDFs
evidence.explanation: Documents that Stage 3 long-context training used the Dolma3 Longmino Mix (100B tokens) composed of midtraining data plus PDFs. ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=%2A%20Dataset%3A%20dolma3,composition%3A%20midtraining%20data%20and%20PDFs))

evidence.excerpt: Dolma 3 Longmino Mix, 50B tokens of long context data.
evidence.explanation: Notes that the Longmino mix provides long-context training data (the repository README references 50B, which was the 7B usage; the 32B model used ~100B tokens). ([github.com](https://github.com/allenai/dolma3#:~:text=Dolma%203%20consists%20of%20three,reconstructing%20the%20Dolma%203%20datasets))

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: FineMath-4+ was the source dataset of high-quality math problems that were transformed (step-by-step solved) into the CraneMath training subset by a teacher LLM. This provided OLMo 3 32B with curated mathematical reasoning content during mid-training.

evidence.excerpt: FineMath was motivated by ... the scarcity of high-quality step-by-step solution data in existing web math corpora.
evidence.explanation: Introduces FineMath as a dataset specifically addressing the need for high-quality step-by-step math solutions ([www.emergentmind.com](https://www.emergentmind.com/topics/finemath-dataset#:~:text=1)).

evidence.excerpt: Released variants include FineMath3+ (34B tokens, 21.4M documents...) and FineMath4+ (10B tokens, 6.7M documents, average 1,490 tokens/doc), reflecting the ... thresholds. FineMath4+ is a subset ... with higher quality, containing detailed explanations.
evidence.explanation: Describes FineMath-4+ as a high-quality subset (~10B tokens across ~6.7M documents) emphasizing detailed step-by-step explanations ([www.emergentmind.com](https://www.emergentmind.com/topics/finemath-dataset#:~:text=Released%20variants%20include%20FineMath3%2B%20,short%20proofs%20and%20extended%20worked)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneMath is a synthetic math reasoning dataset (5.63% of the mid-training mix) created by converting FineMath-4+ problems into step-by-step solutions via an LLM. It provided the model with detailed worked examples of math problem solving during mid-training.

evidence.explanation: Shows that CraneMath (a synthetic math set) contributed ~5.62B tokens (5.63%) in the mid-training data mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=TinyMATH%20Mind%20%20,%7C%203.23M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneCode is a synthetic Python code dataset (10.0% of mid-training) generated by an LLM to augment programming knowledge. It provided large language model-generated code tasks for OLMo 3 32B’s training.

evidence.explanation: Indicates that CraneCode (synthetic Python data) made up 10.0B tokens (10%) of the mid-training corpus ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Dolmino%20Math%20%20,%7C%20101M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: MegaMatt is a synthetic math dataset (1.73% of mid-training) used to provide additional arithmetic or problem-solving examples. It contributed 1.73B tokens of math-focused content to OLMo 3’s mid-training.

evidence.explanation: Shows MegaMatt as a math synthetic subset contributing ~1.73B tokens (1.73%) to the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=TinyMATH%20Mind%20%20,%7C%203.23M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: TinyMATH Mind is a small synthetic math dataset (~0.9% of mid-training) focusing on step-by-step solutions or mental math. It contributed high-quality solved examples of math problems in the mid-training data.

evidence.explanation: Shows TinyMATH Mind as a synthetic math subset (0.9% of mid-training, ~0.898B tokens) included in OLMo 3’s mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=TinyMATH%20Mind%20%20,%7C%203.23M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: TinyMATH PoT (Proof-of-Thought) is another small synthetic math subset (~0.24% of mid-training). It provided a handful of extra math reasoning examples in the training mix, likely focusing on proofs or chain-of-thought steps.

evidence.explanation: Indicates that TinyMATH PoT was a very small synthetic math component (~0.24% of tokens) in the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=TinyMATH%20Mind%20%20,%7C%203.23M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Dolmino Math is the main math-focused synthetic set in the mid-training mix (about 10.7%). It combined numerous math problems and solutions, serving as a primary math training resource for OLMo 3 32B during Stage 2.

evidence.explanation: Dolmino Math appears as a math synthetic component contributing ~10.7B tokens (10.7%) of the mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Dolmino%20Math%20%20,%7C%20101M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: StackEdu (FIM) is a dataset of code examples from educational resources (e.g. programming Q&A) converted into fill-in-the-middle format for training. It made up 10% of the mid-training mix, providing code completion and synthesis tasks drawn from real code content.

evidence.explanation: Shows that StackEdu (FIM) contributed 10.0B tokens (10%) of code data in the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Dolmino%20Math%20%20,%7C%20101M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Reddit to Flashcards dataset (5.9% of mid-training) is a synthetic QA resource created by converting information from Reddit posts into question-answer "flashcard" style pairs. It enriched the training mix with assorted Q&A covering facts and common knowledge derived from Reddit content.

evidence.explanation: Indicates that the Reddit-to-Flashcards synthetic QA dataset contributed ~5.90B tokens (5.9%) to the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=CraneCode%20%20,%7C%20101M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Wiki to RCQA dataset (3.0% of mid-training) consists of reading-comprehension Q&A pairs synthesized from Wikipedia passages. It provided OLMo 3 with question-answer examples based on encyclopedic content, helping to improve its comprehension and retrieval abilities.

evidence.explanation: Shows that the Wiki-to-RCQA synthetic reading comprehension dataset made up ~3.0B tokens (3.0%) of the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Wiki%20To%20RCQA%20%20,%7C%20398K)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Nemotron Synth QA (5.0% of mid-training) is a synthetic question-answer dataset generated by an external model nicknamed "Nemotron." It provided additional QA training signals (likely in specialized domains) to OLMo 3 32B.

evidence.explanation: Shows Nemotron Synth QA as a component comprising ~5.0B tokens (5.0%) of the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Wiki%20To%20RCQA%20%20,%7C%20398K)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Program-Verifiable dataset (0.16% of mid-training) is a small set of model-generated reasoning tasks where answers are checked via program execution. It was created with assistance from GPT-4.1 and GPT-4o-mini, giving OLMo 3 32B exposure to reasoning that can be verified by code.

evidence.explanation: Shows Program-Verifiable as a tiny synthetic reasoning subset (~0.159B tokens, 0.16% of mid-training) ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Program,%7C%20732K)).

evidence.excerpt:
config_name: verifiable_gpt41 ... path: data/verifiable-gpt41/**/*
config_name: verifiable_o4mini ... path: data/verifiable-o4mini/**/*
evidence.explanation: The mid-training dataset config includes components 'verifiable_gpt41' and 'verifiable_o4mini', indicating that data verified by GPT-4.1 and GPT-4o-mini was used to construct the Program-Verifiable subset ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=,gpt41)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The OMR Rewrite FullThoughts dataset (0.85% of mid-training) is a synthetic set of reasoning examples where incomplete or partial solutions were rewritten into "full thought" step-by-step solutions. It gave OLMo 3 32B additional fully elaborated reasoning cases in its training data.

evidence.explanation: Shows the OMR Rewrite FullThoughts synthetic reasoning set at ~0.85% of the mid-training mix (850M tokens) ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Program,%7C%20732K)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The QWQ Reasoning Traces dataset (1.87% of mid-training) contains chain-of-thought traces generated by an external model (likely a Qwen variant). These traces provided OLMo 3 with additional step-by-step reasoning examples from a different model’s perspective.

evidence.explanation: Shows QWQ Reasoning Traces as a synthetic reasoning component (~1.87B tokens, 1.87% of mid-training) ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=QWQ%20Reasoning%20Traces%20%20,%7C%20732K)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: General Reasoning Mix (1.87% of mid-training) is a composite dataset of various smaller reasoning trace sources. It included a variety of chain-of-thought examples (possibly including traces from DeepSeek’s R1 model and others) to broadly enhance open-ended reasoning skills.

evidence.explanation: Shows a General Reasoning Mix of synthetic traces, contributing ~1.87B tokens (1.87%) to the mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=QWQ%20Reasoning%20Traces%20%20,%7C%20732K)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Gemini Reasoning Traces (0.25% of mid-training) is a very small set of chain-of-thought traces produced by Google’s Gemini model. These traces (only 0.246B tokens) exposed OLMo 3 32B to examples of reasoning generated by a cutting-edge external model.

evidence.explanation: Indicates that Gemini Reasoning Traces contributed ~246M tokens (0.25%) of the mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Gemini%20Reasoning%20Traces%20%20,%7C%201.45M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Llama Nemotron Traces (1.25% of mid-training) is a dataset of reasoning traces generated by a combined approach involving Meta’s Llama and the "Nemotron" model. It contributed 1.25B tokens of hybrid-model reasoning examples to OLMo 3’s training.

evidence.explanation: Shows that Llama-Nemotron reasoning traces made up ~1.25B tokens (1.25%) of the mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Gemini%20Reasoning%20Traces%20%20,%7C%201.45M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OpenThoughts2 Traces (1.25% of mid-training) is a dataset of open-source chain-of-thought reasoning examples (second iteration). It added around 1.25B tokens of diverse reasoning demonstrations from an open dataset into OLMo 3 32B’s mid-training.

evidence.explanation: Indicates that OpenThoughts2 reasoning traces comprised ~1.25B tokens (1.25%) of the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Gemini%20Reasoning%20Traces%20%20,%7C%201.45M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The Tülu 3 SFT Mixture (1.1% of mid-training) is a supervised fine-tuning dataset from AI2’s Tülu 3 project containing high-quality instruction-following examples. Including this data in OLMo 3 32B’s training pipeline helped the base model gain some instruction-following and conversational skills.

evidence.explanation: Shows that Tülu 3 SFT data made up ~1.1B tokens (1.1%) of the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Gemini%20Reasoning%20Traces%20%20,%7C%201.45M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Dolmino1 Flan (5.0% of mid-training) is an instruction/QA dataset (likely derived from the FLAN collection or earlier Dolmino experiments). It contributed general language instruction-following and QA examples, making up 5B tokens of OLMo 3’s mid-training data.

evidence.explanation: Shows Dolmino1 Flan as an instruction dataset contributing ~5.0B tokens (5.0%) in the mid-training mix ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Dolmino%201%20Flan%20%20,%7C%2018.3M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Math Meta-Reasoning (0.38% of mid-training) is a small synthetic dataset focusing on meta-cognitive or reflective reasoning about math problems. It provided a minor set of instances where a model reflects on the problem-solving process itself.

evidence.explanation: Indicates a Math Meta-Reasoning subset (~0.381B tokens, 0.38%) included in the mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Wiki%20To%20RCQA%20%20,%7C%20398K)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Code Meta-Reasoning (0.46% of mid-training) is a small synthetic dataset containing reasoning or commentary about code. It offered OLMo 3 32B a few examples where a model explains or reasons about code behavior, which was a tiny portion of training.

evidence.explanation: Shows a Code Meta-Reasoning component (~0.459B tokens, 0.46%) in the mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Wiki%20To%20RCQA%20%20,%7C%20398K)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The OLMOCR Science PDFs dataset (5.0% of mid-training; larger portion in long-context) contains text extracted from high-quality scientific PDF documents via OCR. It supplied OLMo 3 32B with long-form, technical content to improve handling of scientific and formal text, and was especially important in the long-context training stage.

evidence.explanation: Shows that high-quality scientific PDFs (OLMOCR) made up ~4.99B tokens (5.0%) of the mid-training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Dolmino%201%20Flan%20%20,%7C%2018.3M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The STEM-Heavy Crawl subset (5.0% of mid-training) is a selection of web pages with dense science, technology, engineering, or math content. By including this filtered crawl data, OLMo 3 32B was exposed to high-quality technical text from the web during mid-training.

evidence.explanation: Shows that a STEM-Heavy Crawl subset provided ~4.99B tokens (5.0%) of specialized web content for mid-training ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Dolmino%201%20Flan%20%20,%7C%2018.3M)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Qwen3-32B (Alibaba’s 32B model) acted as a teacher LLM to generate training data for OLMo 3. Specifically, Qwen3-32B was used to convert raw math problems (the FineMath4+ dataset) into step-by-step worked solutions (CraneMath) and likely also assisted in producing synthetic code data. This provided OLMo 3 32B with model-generated high-quality content for math and coding during training.

evidence.excerpt: we use Qwen3 32B (Yang et al., 2025a) for generation
evidence.explanation: The technical report states that Qwen3-32B was used to generate data for OLMo 3 (specifically indicating Qwen3-32B served as a data generator).

evidence.excerpt: for CraneMath we used Qwen3-32B for all data generation
evidence.explanation: The CraneMath dataset documentation confirms that Qwen3-32B was the model used to generate 100% of the CraneMath training data, emphasizing Qwen3-32B’s role as the sole generator.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OpenAI’s GPT-4.1 model was used to generate a small subset of OLMo 3 32B’s training data requiring programmatic verification. In particular, GPT-4.1 was prompted to produce reasoning problems and solutions which were then verified via execution (forming the Program-Verifiable dataset). This ensured some of OLMo’s training data included GPT-4-level reasoning examples with correctness checks.

evidence.explanation: The mid-training data configs explicitly include a component named "verifiable_gpt41", indicating that content generated by GPT-4.1 was included in OLMo’s training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=,gpt41)).

This entry corresponds to the data generated by GPT-4.1 (and GPT-4o-mini), showing it constitutes only 0.16% of the training mix. These are the problems whose solutions were verified by code (originating from GPT-4.1). ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Program,%7C%20732K))

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OpenAI’s GPT-4o-mini model (a smaller variant aligned with GPT-4 outputs) was also used to generate part of the Program-Verifiable dataset in OLMo 3’s training. Alongside GPT-4.1, GPT-4o-mini produced and verified reasoning examples (with code) that were included to provide the model with cross-checked high-quality reasoning data.

evidence.explanation: The mid-training data config includes "verifiable_o4mini", indicating that content from OpenAI’s GPT-4o-mini model contributed to OLMo’s training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=match%20at%20L98%20,o4mini)).

The Program-Verifiable dataset (0.16% of training), which includes GPT-4o-mini’s contributions, is shown here. GPT-4o-mini’s outputs were combined with GPT-4.1’s to form this small verified reasoning set. ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Program,%7C%20732K))

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Google’s Gemini 2.0 model was used to generate some chain-of-thought reasoning data ("Gemini Reasoning Traces") that fed into OLMo 3 32B’s training. Although the amount is small (0.25% of mid-training), it injected examples of reasoning from a state-of-the-art external model into OLMo’s training mix, diversifying the style of reasoning the model saw.

evidence.explanation: The mid-training data configs list an entry "gemini_reasoning_traces", indicating that traces generated by the Gemini 2.0 model were included in OLMo 3’s training data ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=match%20at%20L82%20,split%3A%20train%20path%3A%20data%2Fgemini_reasoning_traces)).

Confirms that Gemini-sourced reasoning traces made up only ~0.25% of the mid-training tokens. These were the chain-of-thought outputs from Gemini included in OLMo’s training data. ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/datasets/allenai/dolma3_dolmino_mix-100B-1025/blob/main/README.md#:~:text=Gemini%20Reasoning%20Traces%20%20,%7C%201.45M))

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OLMo 3 32B was evaluated on MMLU (Massive Multi-Task Language Understanding), a standard benchmark covering a broad range of subjects at the college level. This benchmark was used to measure the model’s knowledge and reasoning across STEM, humanities, social science, and other domains.

evidence.excerpt: MMLU STEM ... MMLU Humanities ... MMLU Social Sci. ... MMLU Other
evidence.explanation: The model card’s results table includes multiple MMLU categories (STEM, Humanities, Social Sciences, Other), indicating that MMLU was a key evaluation benchmark for OLMo 3 32B ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=Model%20%20%7C%20Olmo%203,PIQA%20MC)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OLMo 3 32B was evaluated on the HellaSwag benchmark, which tests commonsense reasoning via multiple-choice sentence completion tasks. Using HellaSwag in evaluation assessed the model’s ability to predict the most plausible continuation of a scenario, an indicator of its commonsense understanding.

evidence.explanation: The model’s evaluation results include a column for HellaSwag (under Non-STEM multiple-choice), confirming that HellaSwag was used as an evaluation metric ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=MC%20%20,STEM%20%20%7C%20HellaSwag)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OLMo 3 32B’s capabilities were evaluated on the Big-Bench Hard (BBH) benchmark suite, which consists of challenging tasks designed to test advanced reasoning and problem-solving. Including BBH in the evaluation allowed the team to gauge the model’s performance on out-of-distribution and difficult reasoning problems.

evidence.excerpt: BBH  | MMLU Pro MC  | Deepmind Math
evidence.explanation: The evaluation table shows a column for "BBH" (Big-Bench Hard), indicating that BBH tasks were among the evaluation metrics reported for OLMo 3 32B ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=,LBPP)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The AI2 Reasoning Challenge (ARC) Challenge Set was used to evaluate OLMo 3 32B on science question answering. This benchmark of grade-school science questions (multiple-choice) tested the model’s knowledge and reasoning in scientific domains.

evidence.explanation: The results table for OLMo 3 32B includes "ARC MC" (likely referring to ARC-Challenge multiple-choice) among the evaluation tasks, confirming ARC was used as a benchmark ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=Model%20%20%7C%20Olmo%203,PIQA%20MC)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The HumanEval benchmark (OpenAI’s code generation test) was used to assess OLMo 3 32B’s coding ability. In this evaluation, the model was required to generate correct solutions to programming problems (in Python), and its accuracy was measured on these tasks.

evidence.excerpt: BigCodeBench  | HumanEval  | DeepSeek LeetCode  | DS 1000  | MBPP
evidence.explanation: The evaluation table shows a column for "HumanEval", confirming that HumanEval was one of the code benchmarks on which OLMo 3 32B was evaluated ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=Model%20%20%7C%20Olmo%203,PIQA%20MC)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The MBPP (Mostly Basic Python Problems) benchmark was used to evaluate OLMo 3 32B’s basic coding and problem-solving skills. MBPP consists of simple Python programming tasks, and the model’s performance on these tasks provided a measure of its coding competency.

evidence.explanation: The results snippet includes "MBPP", indicating that the MBPP coding benchmark was among the evaluations run on OLMo 3 32B ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=Model%20%20%7C%20Olmo%203,PIQA%20MC)).

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The MATH benchmark (a dataset of advanced high school/competition math problems) was used to evaluate OLMo 3 32B’s mathematical problem-solving and reasoning ability. By testing the model on complex math questions (with solutions requiring step-by-step reasoning), the team measured how well OLMo handles math tasks after training.

evidence.excerpt: MMLU Pro MC  | Deepmind Math  | LBPP
evidence.explanation: The evaluation results list a "Deepmind Math" score (which corresponds to the MATH benchmark) for OLMo 3 32B, confirming the model was evaluated on the complex math problems of the MATH dataset ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B#:~:text=,LBPP)).
